SiteMetadata.titleDefault: HUMPBUCK - Curated Timepieces | Premium Automatic & Quartz Watches
SiteMetadata.descriptionDefault: Curated automatic and quartz watches — premium movements, skeleton dials, ana-digi quartz, and standout finishing. Handpicked timepieces with secure checkout and global shipping.
SiteMetadata.ogDescription: Premium automatic and quartz watches, curated for everyday wear and collectors. Secure checkout · global shipping.

Footer.tagline: Curated premium automatic and quartz watches with secure checkout and global shipping.
Footer.disclaimer: Prices, taxes, and shipping are confirmed at checkout. For shipping, refunds, privacy, and terms, see Support above. Questions:

Home.metaTitle: HUMPBUCK - Curated Timepieces | Premium Automatic & Quartz Watches
Home.metaDescription: Shop curated automatic and quartz watches at HUMPBUCK — premium mechanical movements, skeleton dials, and precise quartz calibers. Handpicked timepieces with global shipping.
Home.ogDescription: Premium automatic and quartz watches, curated for everyday wear and collectors. Secure checkout · global shipping.
Home.mechanicalHeroLead: Raw mechanical beauty for the man in motion.
Home.mechanicalHeroImageAlt: Close-up of a skeleton mechanical watch movement with gears and bridges
Home.categoryMechanicalLead: Automatic movements, open-worked dials, and finishing built for collectors.
Home.categoryMechanicalImageAlt: Skeleton mechanical watch movement with visible gears
Home.categoryQuartzLead: Precise quartz calibers, ana-digi layouts, and sport-ready cases for everyday timing.
Home.categoryQuartzImageAlt: HUMPBUCK quartz ana-digi watch on wrist
Home.heroLead1: Ana-digi multifunction watch — dual displays, full feature set.
Home.heroLead2: Time, date, alarm, outdoor temperature, and stopwatch modes in a compact stainless steel case — cockpit-clear readability for daily wear.
Home.heroComingSoonBody: We're syncing catalog data. Please check back shortly.
Home.seriesShopCount: Shop the series · {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}
Home.tonneauHeadline: Keep your foot down when life asks you to lift.
Home.tonneauTagline: Racing pulses, flight-deck focus, and materials that earn their place.
Home.tonneauDescription: Some watches remind you of the time. RM-TONNEAU is our reminder that bravery isn’t loud—it’s the decision to move again. The barrel case carries that tension: curved like velocity made solid, open enough to show the work inside. Motorsport, aerospace, and cutting-edge finishing aren’t decoration here; they’re the vocabulary of people who refuse to stall.
Home.rdAstralHeadline: Under the same stars—the courage to keep dreaming.
Home.rdAstralTagline: Inspired by childhood nights under the stars.
Home.rdAstralDescription: RD-ASTRAL draws on the founder as a child—looking up, tracing constellations, trying to glimpse the edge of the cosmos. The watches are our nudge not to let ordinary life wear you down: keep the courage to pursue what you love, and hold onto a sincere passion deep inside. Skeleton architecture and bold dial drama carry that stargazing spirit.
Home.recommendedIntro: Hand-picked automatic and quartz pieces — skeleton dials, premium movements, and standout finishing.
Home.founderStoryImageAlt: Mechanical watch on a wooden post with a child in a rural village in the background
Home.wholesaleBody: We provide premium wholesale watches with dynamic, real-time inventory updates and swift dispatch. From hot-selling models to reliable stock availability, we ensure your business stays agile and competitive in an ever-changing market.
Home.trustGlobalBody: Duty/tax messaging at checkout where applicable.
Home.trustLaunchBody: Factory programs for growing watch brands.
Home.newsletterBody: Curated automatic and quartz drops — premium timepieces for everyday wear.

PolicyContact.title: Contact us
PolicyContact.introDefault: For any questions regarding shipping rates, delivery times, or technical support, please reach out to our team:
PolicyContact.introPrivacy: For privacy-related requests or questions about this Privacy Policy:
PolicyContact.introRefund: For returns, refunds, or policy questions, reach out to our team:

PolicyPages.privacyMetaDescription: How HUMPBUCK collects, uses, and discloses personal information.
PolicyPages.termsMetaDescription: Terms and conditions for using HUMPBUCK and our Services.
PolicyPages.refundMetaDescription: Returns, exchanges, refunds, and exceptions — HUMPBUCK.
PolicyPages.shippingMetaDescription: Shipping policy, processing times, tracking, customs, taxes, and contact — HUMPBUCK.

RefundPolicy.title: Refund policy
RefundPolicy.introStrong: We have a 30-day return policy, which means you have 30 days after receiving your item to request a return.
RefundPolicy.introEligibility: To be eligible for a return, your item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging. You'll also need the receipt or proof of purchase.
RefundPolicy.returnStartA: To start a return, you can contact us at
RefundPolicy.returnStartC: . Please note that returns will need to be sent to the following address:
RefundPolicy.returnAfterAccept: If your return is accepted, we'll send you a return shipping label, as well as instructions on how and where to send your package. Items sent back to us without first requesting a return will not be accepted.
RefundPolicy.damagesBody: Please inspect your order upon reception and contact us immediately if the item is defective, damaged, or if you receive the wrong item, so that we can evaluate the issue and make it right.
RefundPolicy.exceptionsP1: Certain types of items cannot be returned, like perishable goods (such as food, flowers, or plants), custom products (such as special orders or personalized items), and personal care goods (such as beauty products). We also do not accept returns for hazardous materials, flammable liquids, or gases. Please get in touch via email or WhatsApp if you have questions or concerns about your specific item.
RefundPolicy.exceptionsP2: Unfortunately, we cannot accept returns on sale items or gift cards.
RefundPolicy.exchangesBody: The fastest way to ensure you get what you want is to return the item you have, and once the return is accepted, make a separate purchase for the new item.
RefundPolicy.eu14Body: Notwithstanding the above, if the merchandise is being shipped into the European Union, you have the right to cancel or return your order within 14 days, for any reason and without a justification. As above, your item must be in the same condition that you received it, unworn or unused, with tags, and in its original packaging. You'll also need the receipt or proof of purchase.
RefundPolicy.refundsP1: We will notify you once we've received and inspected your return, and let you know if the refund was approved or not. If approved, you'll be automatically refunded on your original payment method within 10 business days. Please remember it can take some time for your bank or credit card company to process and post the refund too.
RefundPolicy.refundsP2: If more than 15 business days have passed since we've approved your return, please contact us.

AffiliatesPublic.metaDescription: Learn how to join the HUMPBUCK affiliate program, how commissions work, and what your affiliate dashboard includes.
AffiliatesPublic.heroLead: If you create content, review watches, or run traffic channels, you can apply to partner with HUMPBUCK and earn commission on attributed orders.
AffiliatesPublic.step1Body: Create a buyer account first, then open your affiliate page in My Account and submit your partner info.
AffiliatesPublic.step2Body: After approval, use your PID link generator. Buyers can land on one product and purchase another product; attribution still applies within the valid window.
AffiliatesPublic.step3Body: In your affiliate dashboard, you can filter settlement orders by status, date range, and export CSV for reconciliation.
AffiliatesPublic.policyLi1: Attribution is valid for 7 days from affiliate link visit, using last-touch logic in that window.
AffiliatesPublic.policyLi2: Self-purchase is excluded. Affiliates do not earn commission from their own orders.
AffiliatesPublic.policyLi3: Refunded orders do not generate commission, and affiliate attribution is removed automatically on refunded orders.
AffiliatesPublic.policyLi4: Settlement starts after delivery confirmation, with a 30-day hold period before commission becomes eligible for payout.
AffiliatesPublic.dashAppBody: Submit your application, set payout details, and keep contact info updated.
AffiliatesPublic.dashLinkBody: Build and copy product links with your PID for campaigns, social, and creator content.
AffiliatesPublic.dashSettleBody: Review order-level commission status: pending, eligible, paid, and reversed, with filters and pagination.
AffiliatesPublic.dashExportBody: Export filtered settlement rows to CSV for finance tracking and monthly reporting.

BlogPage.metaDescription: Stories on curated watches, movements, and style from HUMPBUCK.
BlogPage.title: Blog
BlogPage.intro: Stories on curated watches, movements, and the craft behind HUMPBUCK.
BlogPage.empty: New posts are on the way. Check back soon.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Why HUMPBUCK exists — curated premium automatic and quartz watches for everyday wear and collectors. Contact by email or WhatsApp.
AboutPage.storyP1: I have loved mechanical watches since I was a child. Back then, my family was poor, and I couldn't afford one. However, I was completely fascinated by how the intricate gears interlock and how the complex mechanical structures work together to keep precise time.
AboutPage.storyP2: Now, I have built this mechanical watch website. My goal is to offer high-quality, affordable mechanical watches to everyone, while fulfilling my childhood dream of owning one. Keep chasing your dreams.
AboutPage.contactLead: Product questions or order help — email us or message on WhatsApp.

WholesalePage.metaTitle: China Watch Source Factory Wholesale | HUMPBUCK
WholesalePage.metaDescription: Wholesale watches from China source factories — wide model supply, controllable factory-floor prices, daily updated B2B stock. Message us on WhatsApp or email to confirm watch quality and price before checkout. OEM/ODM available. Ship worldwide or to your China agent. Pay with Stripe or PayPal.
WholesalePage.ogTitle: China watch source factory — wide supply, controllable prices
WholesalePage.heroTitle: China Factory-Direct Watches — Real Stock, Real Control
WholesalePage.title: China Factory-Direct Watches — Real Stock, Real Control
WholesalePage.subtitle: Wholesale · Factory floor access · Daily stock
WholesalePage.heroSocialLead: Search HUMPBUCK or follow us for daily stock updates, factory footage, and new models.
WholesalePage.introP1: Three years ago, unstable work and a heavy mortgage brought me to a crossroads. My sister visited our mother, introduced me to cross-border e-commerce, and passed the HUMPBUCK brand to me — she has run a professional watch factory for decades.
WholesalePage.introP2: I built this store to earn an honest living, support my family, and pay that mortgage — not with shortcuts, but with real factory connections and orders done right. Beyond our own line, trusted source-factory owners authorize me to sell their watches at floor pricing; for bulk custom work, my sister and I handle factory communication and follow-through.
WholesalePage.introP3: Checkout is secured with PayPal and Stripe — credit cards, Google Pay, and Apple Pay.
WholesalePage.storyTeaserLead: Day by day, persistence kept me going — I always believed things would get better
WholesalePage.storyJourneyP1: Day by day, persistence kept me going — I always believed things would get better. Marketplace commissions and ad fees on AliExpress soon became unbearable, so I decided to build my own independent store. As a complete beginner, I started from absolute zero: endless technical hurdles, building buyer trust from scratch, and learning marketing as I went.
WholesalePage.storyJourneyP2: One day I hope to share this technical and personal journey with others. Right now, every hour goes to keeping my family supported and this brand alive.
WholesalePage.storyJourneyP3: I have no budget for paid traffic — I grow through organic social media. Search HUMPBUCK, or find us on Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok. It is slow, but it is the path I will not quit. Payment trust matters too, which is why I integrated PayPal and Stripe.
WholesalePage.storyRootsP1: HUMPBUCK was passed down to me by my sister, who has run a professional watch factory for decades.
WholesalePage.storySourcesP1: Other watches on this page come from source-factory owners I know personally. They support my entrepreneurship and authorize me to sell at direct factory-floor pricing — with fair compensation that helps me meet daily life and my mortgage.
WholesalePage.storySourcesP2: You are buying through an authorized channel, not a random reseller markup.
WholesalePage.storyWhyP1: Major watch factories focus on large orders; they rarely have bandwidth for scattered, small, or custom requests — I do. I communicate, source, pack carefully, and ship overseas or to your agent in China.
WholesalePage.storyWhyP2: When you source from my website, you get more than retail service: a direct line to the production floor. For wholesale OEM/ODM, my sister and I personally negotiate and manage projects with the factories until your brief is delivered.
WholesalePage.inventoryBody: We carry many watch styles and variants, with stock updated daily in this section. Availability changes often — always confirm what is in stock before you place an order.
WholesalePage.beforeOrderBody: Please message us before checkout so we can align on the exact model, variant, and quantity you need. Use the floating WhatsApp or email buttons on any page — we reply quickly with current stock and pricing.
WholesalePage.shippingBody: We can ship internationally to your address, or send to your appointed agent in China for consolidation — whichever fits your workflow.
WholesalePage.paymentBody: Pay with Stripe (credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay) or PayPal. Our wholesale payment link lets you match the agreed total — ideal for mixed models, smaller quantities, and flexible variant needs.
WholesalePage.stepContactBody: WhatsApp or email with model, variant, and quantity.
WholesalePage.stepConfirmBody: We verify availability and agree on your total.
WholesalePage.stepPayBody: Checkout via Stripe or PayPal on our payment link.
WholesalePage.stepShipBody: Ship overseas or to your China agent.
WholesalePage.ctaTitle: Talk first, then confirm the watch quality and price.
WholesalePage.ctaLead: Share your list on WhatsApp or email. When we agree on models and totals, use the wholesale payment link to complete checkout.
WholesalePage.listingsLead: Stock updates daily. Tap a model for photos or video, then message us on WhatsApp or email before ordering.

guide.item1Title: How to build your affiliate link
guide.item1Body: Use the Link generator section below. Paste any product or page URL and it will append your PID automatically. Buyers can land on one product and purchase other products; those orders still count for commission if the affiliate attribution is active.
guide.item2Title: Where to find your Coupon Code
guide.item2Body: Your dedicated coupon code is created and managed by admin. If no code is shown yet, contact admin to bind one to your affiliate profile. Coupon-attributed orders also count for your commission.
guide.item3Title: Where to find your Partner ID (PID)
guide.item3Body: Your Partner ID is shown in Current status as PID. This ID is used in your trackable links (?pid=...). Attribution is valid for 7 days from link visit and follows last-touch within the window (the most recent valid affiliate click gets attribution). Orders placed after 7 days are not attributed unless the buyer clicks an affiliate link again.
guide.item4Body: Commissions become pending after delivery is confirmed (buyer confirmation, or auto-confirm 30 days after shipped), then become eligible after a 30-day hold. Affiliate self-purchases are excluded from commission. Admin then marks payouts as paid in settlement ledger.
guide.item5Body: Please fill payout details (PayPal, bank account, or other) plus contact methods. If you cannot provide a payout account yet, keep your email or WhatsApp updated so admin can contact you for manual settlement.
guide.item6Body: Refunded orders do not generate commission. When an order is refunded, affiliate attribution is automatically removed from that order and settlement is reversed.

linkGen.placeholderResult: Generated tracking link will appear here (PID: {pid})

couponModal.title: Coupon request submitted
couponModal.body: Your coupon code request has been sent to admin. Please wait for review and approval. The coupon code will appear here automatically once it is created and bound to your account.

payoutForm.otherNotice: If your payout method is not listed, please leave your contact details below. We will contact you to confirm the payout method.
